hypotheses.name: 3-phase sprint works across project types
hypotheses.evidence: Sprint 0 followed the 3-phase structure (research, plan, ship) for a greenfield React/TypeScript PWA. The process produced a roadmap, conventions, baseline, and tech stack research. The structure worked naturally for a planning-only sprint.

hypotheses.name: Gates catch real issues
hypotheses.evidence: No code gates to run in Sprint 0 (planning only). Gate commands were defined and verified as appropriate for the stack. Will be testable starting Sprint 1.

hypotheses.name: Skills are followed by agents
hypotheses.evidence: Architect skill guided dependency selection (MapLibre over Mapbox, noble over libsodium -- boring technology, open source first). Security auditor perspective shaped encryption recommendations (scrypt over PBKDF2, AES-KW for key wrapping). PM skill was not directly exercised (no Gherkin criteria written in Sprint 0).

hypotheses.name: Flowstate works for greenfield projects
hypotheses.evidence: Sprint 0 produced all required artifacts for a greenfield project: roadmap (10 phases), conventions, baseline, gate commands. The process naturally handled the 'no existing code' case. Tech stack research via 4 parallel subagents was efficient.
